name: Longrider
description: The Longrider is a single barrel shotgun built for precision. It offers higher accuracy and a tighter pellet spread than most shotguns, but comes with small magazines and a low pellet count. It rewards careful aiming, though frequent reloads can make it awkward to handle.
notes: Gaige: Smaller, Lighter, Faster and some Punk class mod setups can drop the magazine size to zero, preventing the gun from functioning. Anarchy: A 1 shot magazine version helps build stacks quickly and avoids losing stacks from an accidental reload. Zer0: The strong accuracy suits mid range play, and his skills can further tighten aim and boost critical damage. Krieg: Works well with Empty the Rage, as the magazine empties very quickly at close range to trigger the melee bonus.
